title: DfE Update: 17 September 2025
body: "Latest for further education     Article Title     Action Declare your subcontracting arrangements for the 2025 to 2026 academic year   Information Publication of Fraud Awareness Good Practice Guide   Information Change to the T Level funding methodology for academic year 2027 to 2028   Information Update to the 16 to 19 individualised learner record returns guidance   Your feedback Further education workforce data collection     Latest for academies     Article Title     Action Check your data before the autumn school census return   Action Academies accounts return online form is now live   Information Publication of Fraud Awareness Good Practice Guide   Information Common themes arising from Department for Education’s assurance work   Information Change to the T Level funding methodology for academic year 2027 to 2028   Information Update to the 16 to 19 individualised learner record returns guidance   Information Wanted - school governors with commercial expertise   Events and webinars DfE auditor webinar on automating the accounts return   Events and webinars Senior leadership and operations power hour - local government pension offer webinar   Events and webinars DfE Energy for Schools webinar   Events and webinars DfE auditor webinar on automating the accounts return     Latest for local authorities     Article Title     Action Check your data before the autumn school census return   Action Declare your subcontracting arrangements for the 2025 to 2026 academic year   Information Change to the T Level funding methodology for academic year 2027 to 2028   Information Update to the 16 to 19 individualised learner record returns guidance   Information Wanted - school governors with commercial expertise   Events and webinars Senior leadership and operations power hour - local government pension offer webinar   Events and webinars DfE Energy for Schools webinar    "

taxons.title: Further and higher education, skills and vocational training
School and academy financial management and assurance
